issue_buckets.description: Includes UI/UX inconsistencies, unclear messages, and other platform-wide issues. Common problems include broken layouts, confusing error messages, and navigation difficulties. Root causes often involve design flaws or incomplete testing, and fixes involve UI redesigns or improved error handling.

Encompasses defects in predictive maintenance, Insight Builder, and value impact metrics. Common issues include AI enablement failures, widget errors, and ROI miscalculations. Root causes often involve algorithmic inaccuracies or dashboard misconfigurations, and fixes include recalibrating models or updating dashboard settings.

Covers issues related to asset creation, configuration, modeling, reliability, and health. Typical problems include schema mismatches, point role errors, and health score discrepancies. Root causes often involve misconfigured data models or synchronization failures, and fixes typically involve schema updates or re-synchronization.

Covers defects in partner-facing tools like the Partner Portal, RBM Basic App, and Obsolescence App. Common issues include API failures, data discrepancies, and configuration errors. Root causes often involve integration challenges or outdated APIs, and fixes include updating APIs or resolving integration mismatches.

Focuses on issues with data onboarding, contextualization, and migration processes. Typical problems include data discrepancies, schema upload errors, and asset grouping issues. Root causes often stem from incomplete data pipelines or incorrect configurations, and fixes involve data validation and pipeline adjustments.

Covers defects related to user roles, provisioning, access permissions, and synchronization. Common problems include login failures, role misassignments, and access control issues. Root causes often stem from misaligned user policies or synchronization errors, and fixes involve policy updates or re-synchronization.

Addresses problems with connectivity, gateway registration, and data synchronization. Typical issues include installation errors, cloud connector failures, and gateway association problems. Root causes often involve network misconfigurations or outdated firmware, and fixes include firmware updates or reconfiguring network settings.

Focuses on issues with subscription activation, licensing, and related workflows. Typical problems include SKU mismatches, activation failures, and license expiration errors. Root causes often involve backend configuration issues or expired credentials, and fixes include updating configurations or renewing licenses.

root_causes.description: This pattern encompasses defects in user interfaces, dashboards, and overall user experience, often arising from poor design, insufficient testing, or lack of adherence to usability standards. These issues can frustrate users, reduce productivity, and lead to errors in interaction.
root_causes.recommendation: Adopt user-centered design principles and conduct thorough usability testing.

root_causes.description: This pattern includes issues related to data synchronization, accuracy, and consistency, often caused by misaligned processes, timing conflicts, or incorrect data handling. These issues can lead to incorrect or outdated information being displayed or processed, impacting user trust and system reliability.
root_causes.recommendation: Implement robust data validation and synchronization mechanisms with clear logging and monitoring.

root_causes.description: This pattern involves errors in configuration or setup, often caused by unclear documentation, complex setup processes, or human error. These issues can prevent systems from functioning correctly or cause unexpected behavior.
root_causes.recommendation: Simplify configuration processes and provide clear, detailed documentation and validation checks.

root_causes.description: This pattern includes failures in system integration, connectivity, or compatibility, often due to mismatched APIs, versioning issues, or network instability. These issues disrupt workflows and can cause data loss or system downtime.
root_causes.recommendation: Establish rigorous integration testing and version control processes.

root_causes.description: This pattern covers issues related to system performance or scalability, often caused by inefficient code, resource bottlenecks, or inadequate infrastructure. These problems can degrade user experience and limit the system's ability to handle growth.
root_causes.recommendation: Optimize code and infrastructure, and conduct performance testing under realistic load conditions.

root_causes.description: This pattern includes errors in localization or translation, often caused by incomplete language support or incorrect cultural adaptations. These issues can alienate users in specific regions and hinder global adoption.
root_causes.recommendation: Ensure comprehensive localization testing and involve native speakers in the review process.

executive_summary:
The overall health of the defect management process is strong, with a resolution coverage of 93.92% and 1,296 out of 1,399 defects resolved, but key areas of concern require focused attention to maintain system reliability and user satisfaction.

• **Key Trends**:  
  - Asset modeling, data contextualization, and predictive maintenance dashboards are recurring sources of defects, indicating systemic challenges in these areas.  
  - User management and access issues, including role assignments and account creation failures, are frequently reported.  
  - Connectivity and synchronization errors, particularly with gateways, cloud connectors, and data migrations, are persistent across multiple components.  

• **Areas of Concern**:  
  - Critical defects in high-priority components like Partner Portal (Asset Modeling, Data Contextualization) and Partner Apps (RBM Basic App, KPI Dashboard) are impacting core functionalities.  
  - Delays in defect resolution (average 33.58 days) and a growing backlog of open defects (103) could hinder operational efficiency if not addressed.  
  - UX/UI inconsistencies, such as missing data, unreliable filters, and widget failures, are negatively affecting user experience.  

• **Positive Signals**:  
  - High resolution coverage (93.92%) demonstrates strong defect management and team responsiveness.  
  - Monthly fixed defect trends show consistent progress, with significant resolution spikes in key months.  

Focused efforts on high-priority components, user management, and system connectivity will be critical to sustaining operational excellence and addressing recurring issues.

fix_recommendations.action: Address all critical and urgent defects related to predictive maintenance and service case generation.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These defects impact core functionalities like asset maintenance and service case generation, which are critical for operational continuity.

fix_recommendations.action: Resolve defects in the Partner Portal: Asset Modelling and Data Contextualization components.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These components have a high number of issues and are critical for customer onboarding and data accuracy.

fix_recommendations.action: Fix defects in the Forge Value Impact and Insight Builder features.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These features are essential for delivering actionable insights and accurate financial data to customers.

fix_recommendations.action: Resolve issues in the RBM Basic App and KPI Dashboard components.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These components are key to user experience and operational monitoring, and their issues impact usability and data accuracy.

fix_recommendations.action: Fix defects in the Model Editor, Model Publish, and related components.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These defects hinder model synchronization and publishing, which are crucial for system updates and data accuracy.

fix_recommendations.action: Address defects in user management and subscription activation within the Partner Portal.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These issues directly affect customer access and onboarding, impacting customer satisfaction and retention.

fix_recommendations.action: Investigate and resolve defects in SkySpark and AI/ML SDK components.
fix_recommendations.rationale: These components are critical for advanced analytics and data processing, which are key differentiators for the platform.

nlp_themes.description: Issues that do not fit into other predefined categories.
Challenges in contextualizing data and creating accurate asset models.
Issues related to managing users, roles, and permissions.
Issues with partner integrations and unified application functionality.
Performance bottlenecks and user interface/experience issues.
Problems with system connectivity, gateways, and data transmission.
Issues related to predictive maintenance capabilities and associated functionalities.
Challenges with analytics tools and insight generation functionalities.
Problems with rule creation, configuration, and publishing models.
Problems with subscription management and licensing processes.

fix_patterns.description: Addresses problems arising from incorrect or incomplete system configurations or setup errors. Common causes include misconfigured settings, missing dependencies, or improper environment setups. This category ensures systems are properly configured to function as intended.

Covers issues related to ensuring data consistency, accuracy, and synchronization across systems or components. Typical root causes include race conditions, improper data handling, or integration mismatches. This category ensures data remains reliable and consistent across all touchpoints.

Covers defects and enhancements related to user interface, user experience, and accessibility. Common issues include poor design, usability challenges, or non-compliance with accessibility standards. This category ensures interfaces are user-friendly and inclusive.

Focuses on issues related to API communication or integration with third-party systems. Root causes often include mismatched data formats, authentication problems, or deprecated endpoints. This category ensures seamless interaction between systems and external services.

Covers problems related to notifications, alerts, and communication between systems or users. Issues often stem from misconfigured triggers, delivery failures, or incorrect message content. This category ensures timely and accurate communication.

Covers the addition of new features, improvement of existing functionality, or addressing missing capabilities. This category ensures the product evolves to meet user needs and business requirements effectively.

Addresses issues related to system performance, load handling, and scalability. Typical causes include inefficient algorithms, resource bottlenecks, or unoptimized code. This category ensures systems perform efficiently under varying loads and scales effectively.

Focuses on resolving vulnerabilities, authentication issues, and access control problems. Common root causes include weak encryption, improper permissions, or lack of secure coding practices. This category ensures systems are secure and user access is properly managed.

Addresses issues in error detection, reporting, and recovery mechanisms. Common problems include unhandled exceptions, vague error messages, or lack of fallback strategies. This category ensures systems handle errors gracefully and provide meaningful feedback.

Focuses on issues related to language translation, regional settings, and cultural localization. Common root causes include missing translations, incorrect formatting, or lack of support for specific locales. This category ensures the product is accessible to a global audience.

HCBS-95693.root_cause: Duplicate entries found in Find API with different GUIDs, and one duplicate asset has data only for one day in ZOOTR.
HCBS-95693.key_finding: Duplicate zone (E6400_B) created in ZOOTR with mismatched GUIDs.

HCBS-95651.root_cause: Fault created at 9:55 PM in Skyspark, and service case creation occurred at the same time without delay.
HCBS-95651.key_finding: Service case creation timestamps align with fault creation, indicating no delay.

HCBS-95601.root_cause: Emails sent to the assignee group contain the facility ID instead of the site name.
HCBS-95601.key_finding: The issue is related to incorrect data mapping in email notifications.

HCBS-95597.root_cause: No issue from AOC configuration; remapping at EOM level was validated, and data became available after republishing in the model editor.
HCBS-95597.fix_applied: Mappings were checked in the model editor, republished, and data became available in EOM.
HCBS-95597.key_finding: Mislabelled points and incorrect gateway mappings were identified as recurring issues.

HCBS-95520.root_cause: Integration activity with the Partner Portal resolved the data population issue.
HCBS-95520.fix_applied: Validated the defect in staging by adding Nano Precise subscription to a customer and ensuring service case generation worked as expected.
HCBS-95520.key_finding: The issue was related to the integration with the Nano Precise team.

HCBS-95506.fix_applied: Updated the feature flag to be customer-specific and added customer ID to enable asset filtering.
HCBS-95506.key_finding: Feature flag behavior was toggled to be customer-specific for better control.

HCBS-95503.root_cause: Issue in staging environment due to a huge backlog in the system.
HCBS-95503.fix_applied: Backlog cleared, and older messages were processed; new messages are now available immediately in Find API.
HCBS-95503.key_finding: System backlog caused delays in processing messages in the staging environment.

HCBS-95480.root_cause: Product defect related to PDM AI SKUs was identified.
HCBS-95480.fix_applied: The defect was fixed by the team, but further validation was required for specific scenarios.
HCBS-95480.key_finding: Capitalization differences in customer names were tested and passed.

HCBS-95475.root_cause: Comfort mismatch issue resolved, but dataflow issue caused missing data for Tower_D opportunity app.
HCBS-95475.key_finding: Dataflow issue unrelated to comfort harmonization caused missing data for specific apps.

HCBS-95473.root_cause: No delta changes from model sync caused the EOM publish to fail.
HCBS-95473.key_finding: Logs indicate no changes were detected during model sync, leading to file skipping.

HCBS-95466.root_cause: Changes were not promoted to the stage environment due to deployment issues.
HCBS-95466.fix_applied: Changes were promoted, and the issue was verified after deployment.
HCBS-95466.key_finding: Deployment issues delayed the promotion of changes to the stage environment.

HCBS-95453.root_cause: Customer is using the CB model editor instead of the DF model editor due to not being migrated.
HCBS-95453.key_finding: The issue stems from the customer being an existing user not migrated to the DF model editor.

HCBS-95445.root_cause: Duplicate rules appearing even after resync and recompute were performed.
HCBS-95445.key_finding: None of the duplicate rules were targeting assets under the right-side assets list.

HCBS-95440.root_cause: Potential service downtime caused the issue, which had not occurred previously.
HCBS-95440.key_finding: The issue was isolated to a specific site and may be linked to service downtime.

HCBS-95407.root_cause: Old asset name not updated in EOM, causing discrepancies in the rule summary dashboard.
HCBS-95407.fix_applied: Asset name needs to be updated in EOM and synced to Find API.
HCBS-95407.key_finding: The asset rename process was incomplete, leading to outdated names in the dashboard.

HCBS-95389.root_cause: Special characters in customer data caused activity tab loading issues.
HCBS-95389.fix_applied: Special character handling was added for both BACS and non-BACS customers, resolving the issue.
HCBS-95389.key_finding: Activity tab loads successfully after handling special characters.

HCBS-95379.root_cause: Point ID caching behavior in the virtual history sync service was not functioning correctly.
HCBS-95379.fix_applied: Point GUID was manually added to the cache, and code improvements are planned in another ticket.
HCBS-95379.key_finding: Manual addition of Point GUID resolved the immediate issue.

HCBS-95363.root_cause: Gateway timeout issue caused by the kgwriter publish pod not running.
HCBS-95363.fix_applied: Increased the pod count to restore the service and successfully triggered the publish process.
HCBS-95363.key_finding: Increasing pod count resolved the gateway timeout issue.

HCBS-95353.fix_applied: Issue was verified and confirmed resolved by the CSM.

HCBS-95351.root_cause: Predictive Asset Maintenance dashboard algorithm was unable to pick up assets due to model publishing issues.
HCBS-95351.workaround: Immediate action required to republish the model successfully for algorithm execution.

HCBS-95347.root_cause: Duplicate data in the Find API caused operational cost calculation mismatch.
HCBS-95347.fix_applied: Duplicate data was cleaned up, and Apply Default was triggered to resolve the issue.
HCBS-95347.key_finding: Duplicate metrics were identified and removed to fix the issue.

HCBS-95345.root_cause: Dataflow was not occurring due to an issue with the energy database's last updated time.
HCBS-95345.fix_applied: Manually updated the energy database's last updated time, which restored the data flow.
HCBS-95345.key_finding: Updating the energy database's last updated time resolved the dataflow issue.

HCBS-95339.root_cause: Unit discrepancies caused by missing or incorrect unit mappings in the backend.
HCBS-95339.fix_applied: Implemented logic to fetch units from IS*DESCRIBED*BY_UNIT relation or unit.UnitName property, defaulting to point-role's unit if missing.
HCBS-95339.key_finding: Unit mapping logic was enhanced to handle missing or incorrect unit configurations.

HCBS-95338.root_cause: Low CPU limit caused delays in processing due to high I/O operations.
HCBS-95338.workaround: Increase CPU limit to 1500 mCPUs to improve processing time.

HCBS-95331.root_cause: Expired secret in the function app caused publish failures.
HCBS-95331.fix_applied: Renewed the expired secret, which resolved the publish issue.
HCBS-95331.key_finding: Secret expiration in the function app was the root cause of the issue.

HCBS-95315.root_cause: Missing timezone tags for points in SkySpark and DataFlow.
HCBS-95315.workaround: Verify and add proper timezone tags in DataFlow and publish to SkySpark.

HCBS-95285.root_cause: Special characters in service case label filters caused dashboard save failures.
HCBS-95285.fix_applied: Updated Octopus variable `Validation__FreeTextFields` and redeployed to handle special characters.
HCBS-95285.key_finding: Special character validation was missing in service case label filters.

HCBS-95280.root_cause: Configuration gaps at different sites caused the remote PPM report to fail.
HCBS-95280.key_finding: Each site may have unique configuration issues impacting the report functionality.

HCBS-95242.root_cause: EOM job filtered out asset types not matching AHU, FCU, and CHILLERS, causing site ID issues.
HCBS-95242.key_finding: Point role configuration in EOM was insufficient for certain asset types.

HCBS-95234.root_cause: Blended tariff telemetry not associated with any blended tariff metric caused the maintenance cost metric engine to stop.
HCBS-95234.fix_applied: Cleaned up unassociated blended tariff telemetry, restoring custom task metrics.
HCBS-95234.key_finding: Unassociated blended tariff telemetry caused the maintenance cost metric engine to fail.

HCBS-95228.fix_applied: The defect was fixed and verified in performance and staging environments.

HCBS-95224.root_cause: Adjusting the column width in one table caused unintended changes in the row data configuration of another table.
HCBS-95224.fix_applied: Sorting and resizing issues were verified and resolved in both Heatmap and Tab in the performance and staging environments.
HCBS-95224.key_finding: Similar issues were observed in the PDM heatmap.

HCBS-95215.root_cause: The model in Skyspark and EOM are not in sync.
HCBS-95215.key_finding: The issue may require involvement from the DF team if AOC cannot resolve it.

HCBS-95140.root_cause: Default rules in Skyspark could not be cleaned up in the non-BACS (Old Flow), causing Skyspark to fail in responding.
HCBS-95140.fix_applied: The default rules were cleaned up in Skyspark, and the publish was retried.
HCBS-95140.key_finding: This issue does not occur in the BACS flow.

HCBS-95109.root_cause: The custom asset type was not displaying in the CDT page even after clearing the model cache.
HCBS-95109.key_finding: EOM still contains the 'Closed Control Unit' custom asset type.
HCBS-95109.workaround: Clearing the model cache was attempted but did not resolve the issue.

HCBS-95105.fix_applied: The issue is expected to be resolved after moving the related ticket BACS-44705 to production.
HCBS-95105.key_finding: The issue is related to rule recompute errors without error traces in the analytics server.

HCBS-95100.root_cause: The point role data was permanently wiped from 44 points after the point confirmation issue auto-resolved.
HCBS-95100.key_finding: The issue from HCBS-93737 reoccurred in production at the Muscat Airport site before auto-resolving.

HCBS-95097.fix_applied: The issue was resolved by backfilling data and confirming with the requester.

HCBS-95093.fix_applied: The issue was fixed and validated in the staging environment.
HCBS-95093.key_finding: The fix ensures that the custom date range is retained when navigating between dashboards.

HCBS-95088.root_cause: The configuration value SystemPrimaryKeyBackfillConfig_BatchSize was set to 1000, causing SkySpark to throw a bad gateway error.
HCBS-95088.fix_applied: The batch size was reduced to 100, allowing the system primary key to update successfully.
HCBS-95088.key_finding: The issue was resolved manually at the Manatí site due to its long-standing nature.
HCBS-95088.workaround: A tool was provided to correct the configuration issue.

HCBS-95072.key_finding: Recomputing showed better percentages but was not completing properly due to missing error traces.

HCBS-95035.root_cause: The timezone value was removed or overwritten during the site onboarding process.
HCBS-95035.fix_applied: The timezone value 'America/Mexico_City' was updated to the EOM site, and the issue was verified after publishing.
HCBS-95035.key_finding: The site was onboarded in November 2025, and the root cause could not be identified.

HCBS-94954.root_cause: Intermittent server overload caused delays in processing client requests during peak load periods.
HCBS-94954.key_finding: The application experiences high usage during peak load periods, leading to resource delays.
HCBS-94954.workaround: Scaling up allocated resources vertically is being implemented to address the issue.

HCBS-94952.root_cause: Fault was deleted after creation, and Spark data was imported into databases for days when SkySpark showed no fault.
HCBS-94952.key_finding: Asset availability service updates to 100% due to running for the last three days.

HCBS-94875.root_cause: No rule function developed by AOC to remove sparks from SkySpark server; service case received despite no fault in SkySpark.
HCBS-94875.key_finding: Restart did not resolve the issue; Spark is missing from SkySpark.

HCBS-94874.root_cause: Energy Cost Analysis metric calculation was stuck due to a duplicate blended tariff.
HCBS-94874.fix_applied: Duplicate blended tariff was addressed to allow metric calculation to progress.

HCBS-94865.root_cause: Cookie consent banner was configured for a specific domain, causing refresh issues.
HCBS-94865.fix_applied: Issue resolved with confirmation from the META team.

HCBS-94768.root_cause: Blended tariff value was duplicated across multiple sites.
HCBS-94768.key_finding: Issue affected multiple sites, including Salalah Airport.

HCBS-94767.root_cause: Setpoint did not have a zone tag in SkySpark, leading to incorrect comfort values in the ZOOTR dashboard.
HCBS-94767.fix_applied: Zone tag was updated for the setpoint, resolving the issue.

HCBS-94760.root_cause: Admin portal call failed due to incorrect customer ID format with curly braces in the org table.
HCBS-94760.fix_applied: Curly braces were removed from the customer ID in the org table.

HCBS-94759.key_finding: Metrics for removed assets had incorrect units and required deletion.
HCBS-94759.workaround: SRE assistance needed to delete invalid metrics.

HCBS-94758.root_cause: Authorization errors due to incorrect customer ID format in the org table.
HCBS-94758.fix_applied: Curly braces were removed from the customer ID, resolving the issue.

HCBS-94677.key_finding: ROI was limited to processing a maximum of 250 sites.

HCBS-94647.root_cause: Incorrect GUIDs in a new Excel template caused duplicate entries in the TTL file.
HCBS-94647.fix_applied: Existing template was used, and URLs were updated carefully.

HCBS-94645.root_cause: Incompatibility between spogApp versions caused PDM to fail to load.
HCBS-94645.fix_applied: Rolled back spogApp version to match the production version.

HCBS-94533.root_cause: Service case was not created due to an open service case for the same fault in the internal store but not in the service case store.
HCBS-94533.key_finding: Mismatch between internal store and service case store caused the issue.

HCBS-94491.root_cause: SS publish failed due to an asset having a null asset type property.
HCBS-94491.fix_applied: Null asset type property was identified and fixed using an EOM asset query or a null check fix in a specific WebJob version.
HCBS-94491.key_finding: Zones with null asset types were categorized under Miscellaneous in SS.

HCBS-94487.key_finding: Similar issue with AI insights causing dashboard crashes was reported in a non-prod environment earlier.

HCBS-94476.root_cause: The query was failing due to hitting the 50000 elastic page limit.
HCBS-94476.fix_applied: Scroll functionality was implemented to handle large datasets.
HCBS-94476.key_finding: Issue can only be tested on a site with a large dataset.

HCBS-94235.root_cause: Scientific notation was being used for some CB sites when downloading CSV locally.
HCBS-94235.fix_applied: Tenant was onboarded in US production for testing.
HCBS-94235.key_finding: Steps for SRE/Digiops to handle CSV onboarding need documentation.

HCBS-94226.root_cause: Performance issue identified with the Heatmap widget when refreshing and interacting with the chart.
HCBS-94226.fix_applied: Issue was verified and fixed in the staging environment.
HCBS-94226.key_finding: The Heatmap widget required a refresh to display data correctly.

HCBS-94014.root_cause: Service cases with 'No Fault Found' were not being ignored during recalculations after cleanup.
HCBS-94014.fix_applied: Queries were run to ensure service cases were returned correctly from the findAPI requests.
HCBS-94014.key_finding: Code changes were required to ensure proper handling of service cases.

HCBS-94006.root_cause: API calls were failing due to expired secrets.
HCBS-94006.fix_applied: Secrets were updated, and AOC confirmed the issue was resolved.
HCBS-94006.key_finding: Expired secrets caused the API calls to fail.

HCBS-93991.root_cause: Feature engineering task was failing due to multiple CB site IDs for a single EOM site ID.
HCBS-93991.fix_applied: The issue was fixed, and old and new jobs were tested successfully in staging.
HCBS-93991.key_finding: The smart triaging code only processes records where smart triage is set to true.

HCBS-93875.fix_applied: SIT testing was completed, and the issue was resolved, allowing the Spatial Hierarchy Template to be downloaded.
HCBS-93875.key_finding: The issue was resolved after testing in both existing and new sites.

HCBS-93859.root_cause: Deployment issue caused the feature to malfunction.
HCBS-93859.fix_applied: The deployment was redone, and the issue was verified as resolved.
HCBS-93859.key_finding: The issue was related to deployment and resolved after redeployment.

HCBS-93820.root_cause: Uncertainty about whether AR (NanoPrecise) qualifications were met.
HCBS-93820.fix_applied: Successfully onboarded 4 customers across EU and US environments using both legacy and new flows.
HCBS-93820.key_finding: No issues were reported after onboarding, and the ticket was closed.

HCBS-93769.root_cause: Facility ID was incorrectly entered as 'c27' instead of 'c25' in the database.
HCBS-93769.fix_applied: The service case and database data were corrected with assistance from the SRE team.
HCBS-93769.key_finding: Incorrect facility ID in the database caused the issue.

HCBS-93748.root_cause: Fault 'last active' status was not being updated correctly.
HCBS-93748.fix_applied: The issue was verified in staging, and the fault 'last active' status was updated properly.
HCBS-93748.key_finding: The fault 'last active' status was initially showing outdated information.

HCBS-93601.root_cause: Service case and fault data were coming in the same Kafka topic, causing issues with the pipeline design.
HCBS-93601.fix_applied: A fix was deployed in production across all regions to update the Kafka topic configuration.
HCBS-93601.key_finding: The pipeline was designed to handle both service case and fault data in the same Kafka topic.

HCBS-93600.root_cause: Assets with EOM changes during model promotion from v3 to v4 were not picked up by the v4 model.
HCBS-93600.fix_applied: Metrics for invalid assets were manually cleaned up in FindAPI, and dashboards now display supported asset types correctly.
HCBS-93600.key_finding: EOM changes during model promotion caused discrepancies in asset processing.

HCBS-93599.fix_applied: Tooltip functionality for recommendations was verified and fixed.
HCBS-93599.key_finding: Tooltip for recommendations was not displaying correctly in the trend chart.

HCBS-93594.root_cause: Save button was disabled for Widget IB due to missing widget label.
HCBS-93594.fix_applied: Users were instructed to click on the outer widget and add the required widget label.
HCBS-93594.key_finding: Widget IB requires a widget label for functionality.

HCBS-93589.root_cause: Model sync status remained 'In Progress' due to missing logs.
HCBS-93589.fix_applied: Configured points were reset to 0 after cache clear and GUID save.
HCBS-93589.key_finding: Admin portal settings require proper GUID save for synchronization.

HCBS-93583.root_cause: Fast store requests in asset history service were not enabled, preventing 1-week data retrieval.
HCBS-93583.fix_applied: Facility ID was added to enable fast store for historical trend.
HCBS-93583.key_finding: Enabling fast store requests resolves historical data retrieval issues.

HCBS-93520.root_cause: Currency mismatch occurred due to lack of auto-sync between CB-Adminportal and EOM for NON-BACS customers.
HCBS-93520.fix_applied: Manual refresh of EOM was performed to align currency settings.
HCBS-93520.key_finding: NON-BACS customers require manual EOM refresh for currency updates.
HCBS-93520.workaround: Manual refresh of EOM until migration to BACS.

HCBS-93479.fix_applied: Assets were removed from ZOOTR as confirmed by users.

HCBS-93426.root_cause: Localization column was missing in customer data during production release.
HCBS-93426.fix_applied: Void was cast into string to handle missing localization column.
HCBS-93426.key_finding: Localization data absence required casting workaround.

HCBS-93419.fix_applied: Dashboard configuration was verified and confirmed to work properly.
HCBS-93419.key_finding: Dashboard configuration loads within 15 seconds for UNSW sites.

HCBS-93416.root_cause: Fault mode incorrectly identified cycling issue; actual issue was fluctuating supply temperature.
HCBS-93416.fix_applied: Model input was corrected to avoid false fault probability calculations.
HCBS-93416.key_finding: Fault issues are site and data-specific.

HCBS-93415.root_cause: Scores dropped due to new fault modes and Health Index calculation methods.
HCBS-93415.fix_applied: Regression testing confirmed end-to-end functionality after model changes.
HCBS-93415.key_finding: New fault modes impact Health Index scores.

HCBS-93414.root_cause: Asset was turned off, leading to score calculation being stopped.
HCBS-93414.fix_applied: Error message was updated on the UI to reflect the asset status.
HCBS-93414.key_finding: Score calculation halts for turned-off assets.

HCBS-93413.root_cause: False positives and misfindings from the Machine Learning model caused incorrect unstable control issue.
HCBS-93413.fix_applied: Regression testing confirmed functionality; site-specific validations required.
HCBS-93413.key_finding: Machine Learning models may produce false positives.

HCBS-93412.fix_applied: SAS onboarding was successful after SparkProcessor logs were analyzed.
HCBS-93412.key_finding: Service cases require migration to new customer setup.
HCBS-93412.workaround: Separate work planned for service case migration.

HCBS-93409.fix_applied: Zones were corrected by moving them from custom asset type to standard asset type.
HCBS-93409.key_finding: No code fix was required; issue resolved through support actions.

HCBS-93394.fix_applied: Old recommendations were removed and the issue was verified in both stage and production environments.
HCBS-93394.key_finding: Old recommendations were displayed in the Overview tab instead of the latest ones.

HCBS-93393.root_cause: The icon was removed even when recommendations were available, and the issue occurred in production when the recommendation count exceeded 1,000.

BACS-24479.root_cause: Duplication of points occurred due to changes in naming conventions within the controller and limitations in the old pipeline.
BACS-24479.key_finding: DataFabric does not have the capability to remove points; changes to point names must be handled in EOM.

BACS-24476.root_cause: Sensor health widget failed to load due to unsupported special characters.
BACS-24476.workaround: Customer ID, site ID, or a screenshot from the DataFabric screen was requested for further investigation.

BACS-24410.root_cause: Standard point names or prefixes were not used in the database, leading to manual efforts.
BACS-24410.fix_applied: Smart Assist was used to resolve the issue.
BACS-24410.key_finding: Asset names were predicted as expected, but users had manually changed them.

BACS-24383.root_cause: The issue was likely caused by a deployment occurring at the same time.
BACS-24383.fix_applied: The defect was uncanceled and marked as fixed after investigation.
BACS-24383.key_finding: The issue was not reproducible after the suspected deployment conflict.

BACS-24349.root_cause: Widgets with no title could get corrupted by titles from other widgets.
BACS-24349.key_finding: The issue could not be replicated in the staging or performance environments.

BACS-24180.root_cause: Analog points with a localValueTransform or enum definition were showing 'No Data' when the analog value matched an enum ordinal.
BACS-24180.fix_applied: Changes were made to ensure analog points with localValueTransform display numerical values in Insight Builder.
BACS-24180.key_finding: The fix was verified in Storybook as no non-production site had the required configuration.

BACS-24149.root_cause: Duplicate points were shown due to the need for gateway point cleanup.
BACS-24149.fix_applied: Duplicate points were cleaned for the specified sites.
BACS-24149.key_finding: The fix applies only to new sites; existing sites require manual cleanup.

BACS-24148.root_cause: A flag was enabled in performance and staging environments but not in production.
BACS-24148.fix_applied: The flag was enabled in production, and the issue was validated as fixed.
BACS-24148.key_finding: Feature loading was consistent after enabling the flag in all environments.

BACS-24091.root_cause: Subscription creation error due to Forge IAM issue with site association.
BACS-24091.fix_applied: Re-associated the same site to the same gateway.
BACS-24091.key_finding: Customer sites were impacted, and the committed delivery date was surpassed.

BACS-24066.root_cause: Redundant assets remained in the UI until a re-run was performed.
BACS-24066.fix_applied: Performed a re-run to remove redundant assets.
BACS-24066.key_finding: Empty assets are removed after merging and re-running the model.

BACS-24065.root_cause: SFDC API credentials expired, causing issues with the obsolescence engine.
BACS-24065.fix_applied: Credentials were updated, and the obsolescence engine was re-run to resolve the issue.
BACS-24065.key_finding: The issue was specific to the controller type 'VLC-651R'.

BACS-24054.root_cause: Logic for updating point details caused 'Ignored Points' to show as 'Unassigned Points' in the UI.
BACS-24054.fix_applied: Confirmed this behavior as expected and marked the issue as fixed.
BACS-24054.key_finding: The behavior was consistent with the logic implemented.

BACS-24048.root_cause: Onboarding failed due to missing backend Databricks job execution.
BACS-24048.fix_applied: Ran Databricks jobs after deploying new DE code.
BACS-24048.key_finding: Contextualization worked for sites with and without graphic files.

BACS-24042.root_cause: Widget configurations were cleared if preview data lacked required information.
BACS-24042.fix_applied: Tested and confirmed that widget configurations now persist as expected.
BACS-24042.key_finding: Custom widget properties are retained after reopening with different date selections.

BACS-24039.root_cause: Logic for handling ignored points was not consistent across re-runs.
BACS-24039.fix_applied: Updated logic in `func_insert_update_point_details` and `func_insert_update_asset_details` to handle ignored points.
BACS-24039.key_finding: Ignored points were correctly handled across assets after the fix.

BACS-23821.root_cause: Certificate expired after modifying the gateway name.
BACS-23821.fix_applied: Required changes were made, and the issue was validated in staging.
BACS-23821.key_finding: Revoke Authentication Popup was successfully displayed after the fix.

BACS-23767.root_cause: Schema upload failed due to a point role with a space and asset type name conflict.
BACS-23767.fix_applied: Corrected point role and asset type issues, and re-uploaded the schema successfully.
BACS-23767.key_finding: Asset type conflicts and point role formatting issues can cause schema upload failures.

BACS-23715.root_cause: Schedule compliance widget did not load due to algorithms not picking new assets.
BACS-23715.fix_applied: Algorithms were run, and the widget loaded successfully with new assets.
BACS-23715.key_finding: The next algorithm run resolved the issue by picking up newly added assets.

BACS-23664.root_cause: Insight Builder crashed when using a table with two data sources and a calculated field.
BACS-23664.fix_applied: Tested and confirmed that widgets with multiple data sources and calculated fields now work as expected.
BACS-23664.key_finding: The issue was resolved for both staging and production environments.

BACS-23658.root_cause: Enum mapping standardization failed during publish.
BACS-23658.key_finding: The issue was reproducible in EU Prod but lacked validation for enum mapping.

BACS-23650.root_cause: Config sheet upload error occurred due to missing details for analysis.
BACS-23650.fix_applied: Site was unblocked with a workaround, and onboarding was completed.
BACS-23650.workaround: Unblocked the site with a temporary workaround.

BACS-23649.root_cause: Older version of the DS job was deployed in production for testing.
BACS-23649.fix_applied: Deployed the latest DS core job version, cleaned up the site, and re-synced the model.
BACS-23649.key_finding: Older DS job versions can cause asset prediction issues.

BACS-23615.root_cause: Duplicate users were created due to the migration tool adding them to the users table as duplicates when the identities table entry did not exist.
BACS-23615.fix_applied: The issue was handled in the code to prevent duplicate user creation.
BACS-23615.key_finding: The issue was linked to the OccupantUserProcessor.cs created by the BMS team.

BACS-23554.root_cause: Users were added to the orgcaching service with a significant delay due to slow processing of user add events.
BACS-23554.fix_applied: A version with more logging was deployed, and the issue was resolved after repriming the cache.
BACS-23554.key_finding: No failures occurred during user additions, but caching delays caused the issue.

BACS-23542.root_cause: Site and customer info were not flowing into the DF screen from the EBI application.
BACS-23542.fix_applied: The issue was linked to a similar defect (BACS-23640) and moved to 'Pending Test' after discussions.
BACS-23542.key_finding: The root cause was consistent with a previously identified defect.

BACS-23537.root_cause: Pricing for SEK currency was not loaded into Zuora, causing the error.
BACS-23537.fix_applied: DKK pricing was loaded into Zuora, but SEK pricing was still pending input from the Offering Manager.
BACS-23537.key_finding: The issue was related to incomplete pricing data in Zuora.

BACS-23534.root_cause: Pricing for NOK currency was not loaded into Zuora.
BACS-23534.fix_applied: NOK pricing was loaded into Zuora, and the issue was resolved.
BACS-23534.key_finding: The customer was able to purchase the subscription after the fix.

BACS-23528.root_cause: The gateway_id was not updated, which blocked asset discovery.
BACS-23528.fix_applied: The gateway_id was updated, and all reported assets were discovered.
BACS-23528.key_finding: The issue will not occur with Smart Assist.

BACS-23526.root_cause: ConnectivityKey needs to be updated when the installation user's password is changed.
BACS-23526.fix_applied: The customer was unblocked, and a new story/defect will be raised for further improvements.
BACS-23526.workaround: Reinstalling the connectivity package updates the ConnectivityKey.

BACS-23517.root_cause: Currency mapping was not handled correctly during the CB to RBM migration.
BACS-23517.fix_applied: The mapping tool was updated, and SIT handover was completed.
BACS-23517.key_finding: Currency changes were handled in the mapping tool.

BACS-23515.fix_applied: Imperial units like psi, cfm, and H2O were verified to work correctly in the DF tool in the staging environment.
BACS-23515.key_finding: The search functionality for imperial units was confirmed to be working as expected.

BACS-23493.root_cause: I/O failures occurred during the operation of the portal API service.
BACS-23493.fix_applied: The portal API service was restarted, resolving the issue.
BACS-23493.key_finding: The issue was caused by environment-related errors.

BACS-23486.root_cause: The flag to restrict apps based on SKU was not enabled, leading to corrupted energy report records.
BACS-23486.fix_applied: The flag was enabled to prevent future defects, but existing corrupted records remain unresolved.
BACS-23486.key_finding: The issue was related to SKU-based feature flag enablement.

BACS-23479.root_cause: A special character in the username caused the RBM to CB user sync to fail.
BACS-23479.fix_applied: The update was applied in the PROD EU environment to handle the special character limitation.
BACS-23479.key_finding: Special character limitations in usernames caused the sync failure.

BACS-23474.fix_applied: The defect was fixed, and the customer was informed.
BACS-23474.key_finding: The issue was resolved, and the defect was moved to 'Pending Test'.

BACS-23450.root_cause: The QA URL was not configured correctly in Octopus Variables, causing navigation issues.
BACS-23450.fix_applied: The QA URL was updated, and the issue was fixed in production.
BACS-23450.key_finding: The defect was related to incorrect URL configurations in the QA environment.

BACS-23239.root_cause: HCECB offering was missing for the site, preventing comfort and asset performance data from being available in PDM.
BACS-23239.fix_applied: The issue was assigned to the Titan team for resolution.
BACS-23239.key_finding: The transition to subscription-based offerings caused the issue.

BACS-23236.fix_applied: Issue resolved as per user confirmation.

BACS-23233.fix_applied: Verified that Smart Assist assets follow the same asset type as the template asset.
BACS-23233.key_finding: No mismatch observed in asset type between Smart Assist assets and the template asset.

BACS-23230.fix_applied: Changes deployed to ensure the role name is displayed as 'Organization Manager'.

BACS-23228.fix_applied: Country field made non-editable and data mapped through RBM portal as per new design.
BACS-23228.key_finding: Country lists are in correct order as per validation in staging.

BACS-23225.fix_applied: Widget titles updated to bold for uniformity across Portfolio View and Site View.

BACS-23223.root_cause: Field visibility depends on specific user permissions and conditions.
BACS-23223.fix_applied: User permissions were updated to resolve the issue.

BACS-23220.root_cause: Production version was built on a hotfix branch, causing issues with contextualization.
BACS-23220.fix_applied: Resolved and unblocked failed sites from US and EU regions.

BACS-23206.root_cause: Points were duplicated due to existing site data not being cleaned up.
BACS-23206.fix_applied: Fix deployed to production and cleanup performed for existing sites.
BACS-23206.key_finding: Fix is applicable only for new sites; existing sites require manual cleanup.

BACS-23183.root_cause: Site association occurred before model or nameplate file synchronization.
BACS-23183.fix_applied: Fixed the edge case to ensure proper synchronization before site association.
BACS-23183.key_finding: Logs confirmed data was pushed to the site.

BACS-23172.root_cause: Enum values were not standardized and were case-sensitive.
BACS-23172.fix_applied: Enum values standardized to always update in lowercase on the DF Asset Modelling page.
BACS-23172.key_finding: Enum standardized value lists properly under enum groups in staging.

BACS-23108.fix_applied: Verified with Titan Portal and confirmed documentation links are updated.

BACS-23102.root_cause: Duplication caused by listag files arriving in split seconds.
BACS-23102.fix_applied: Duplicate points cleaned up for affected sites.
BACS-23102.key_finding: Some sites onboarded before the fix required manual cleanup.

BACS-23095.root_cause: Significant delay in fetching overridden tab data due to overwhelming ingestion.
BACS-23095.fix_applied: Accepted the behavior as expected due to 15-minute gateway data fetch intervals.
BACS-23095.key_finding: Overridden tab data is fetched from forge history with potential delays.

BACS-23092.root_cause: Environment variable PointFilterCountLimit was not taking effect.
BACS-23092.fix_applied: Fixed the environment variable in dashboardcomposer to ensure proper filtering.

BACS-23068.root_cause: Orphan asset rename issue caused duplicate asset IDs.
BACS-23068.fix_applied: Duplicate asset IDs prevented and re-run completed successfully after renaming.

BACS-23064.root_cause: The unit column goes blank when 'unitless' is selected as a unit for points.
BACS-23064.fix_applied: The functionality was verified in Staging and Prod environments, and re-run and model publish worked fine with 'unitless' assigned to Boolean points.
BACS-23064.key_finding: Assigning 'unitless' as a unit does not cause issues with re-run or model publishing.

BACS-23005.root_cause: The DC was incorrectly set for one site in the Admin portal, and a mandatory extension was missing for another site.
BACS-23005.fix_applied: The DC was corrected in the Admin portal for one site, and the missing extension was added and re-deployed for the other site.
BACS-23005.key_finding: The issue was isolated to specific sites and resolved after correcting the DC and adding the missing extension.

BACS-22951.root_cause: Hierarchy and gateway information were missing for the site.
BACS-22951.fix_applied: The hierarchy was manually added for the site.
BACS-22951.workaround: Manually adding the hierarchy resolved the issue.

BACS-22945.root_cause: Gateway names longer than 30 characters caused customer/site association failures.
BACS-22945.fix_applied: Changes were deployed to allow gateway names up to 50 characters, and validated in SIT.
BACS-22945.key_finding: Older gateways with names of 30 characters were not validated.

BACS-22937.root_cause: The model lacked Systemguid configuration, and points were not properly associated with the gateway.
BACS-22937.fix_applied: The issue was confirmed as fixed after addressing the Systemguid configuration and point association.

BACS-22911.fix_applied: A smoke test was performed in the staging PDM IB, and no issues were observed.

BACS-22909.root_cause: The site onboarding prediction task failed in PROD due to Out-of-Memory (OOM) issues.
BACS-22909.fix_applied: Backend site cleanup and Databricks job execution resolved the issue without requiring a configuration file upload.
BACS-22909.key_finding: Skipping the configuration file upload avoided OOM issues.

BACS-22908.root_cause: Discrepancies in the RolePrivilege script in DevD and QAA databases.
BACS-22908.fix_applied: The script was updated and executed, enabling the Energy Manager role.
BACS-22908.key_finding: Despite the fix, the role was still not visible for some users.

BACS-22732.root_cause: Timeout values for all DCs were insufficient.
BACS-22732.fix_applied: Timeout values were increased from 60 seconds to 120 seconds for all DCs.

BACS-22731.root_cause: Event messages were not received from RBM to CB, and user statuses were incorrectly displayed for already synced users.
BACS-22731.fix_applied: One issue from the Sync Service was addressed and handed over to SIT for testing.

BACS-22730.root_cause: The subscription custom map table was not updated with required details.
BACS-22730.fix_applied: Details were manually added to the database as a workaround.
BACS-22730.workaround: Manually adding records to the SubscriptionCustomerMap table resolved the issue temporarily.

BACS-22690.root_cause: Incorrect parameter mapping for Lonworks model and missing program ID mapping to human-readable labels.
BACS-22690.fix_applied: The parameter map was updated, and the program ID was mapped using SpidData.xml. A new Cloud Connector version was published.
BACS-22690.key_finding: Scheduled auto-collection details were missing in the Partner Portal.

BACS-22595.root_cause: The issue was specific to sites where the Building Insights currency metric was created before the currency-handling fix.
BACS-22595.key_finding: The currency mismatch issue is no longer observed after the fix.

BACS-22432.fix_applied: Asset creation with special characters and case-sensitive inputs was verified to work as expected in both Staging and Prod environments.

BACS-22404.root_cause: The schema upload error file was not downloaded with the correct file extension.
BACS-22404.fix_applied: The issue was resolved, and the error file now downloads with the correct '.xlsx' extension.

BACS-22316.root_cause: Issue occurred due to a failure in rerun functionality for newly onboarded sites.
BACS-22316.fix_applied: Rerun functionality was fixed and verified successfully in staging.
BACS-22316.key_finding: The issue was specific to the customer EBI*Jul23*SIT_Org and site EBI*Jul23*Site01.

BACS-22312.root_cause: The issue was caused by a permission mismatch where the user was assigned the unsupported 'Portfolio Operator' role in the new flow.
BACS-22312.fix_applied: The user's role was updated to 'Portfolio Manager', resolving the issue.
BACS-22312.key_finding: Conflicting data flows occurred due to the site being present in both the legacy and new workflows.

BACS-22306.root_cause: The device was offline, making it difficult to check the trend log.
BACS-22306.key_finding: The issue was intermittent and linked to the BMS not being continuously operational on site.
BACS-22306.workaround: The team suggested bringing the device online to investigate further.

BACS-22276.fix_applied: Verified in staging with different som.guid and server address; files were successfully downloaded.
BACS-22276.key_finding: The issue was environment-specific and resolved by verifying the configuration.

BACS-22272.root_cause: The issue occurred when a less-than symbol was followed by a letter in a contenteditable div.
BACS-22272.fix_applied: Text formatting within the contenteditable div was restricted to prevent the issue.
BACS-22272.key_finding: The issue was related to improper handling of user input in the contenteditable div.

BACS-22214.root_cause: Comfort score was zero for sites migrated from PdM to RBM due to issues with virtual points creation in SkySpark.
BACS-22214.key_finding: Virtual points for setpoints were not created correctly during migration.

BACS-22206.root_cause: The KPI dashboard was blank because a publish was triggered from the old Admin portal post-migration.
BACS-22206.fix_applied: Running migration tool 2 resolved the issue.

BACS-22179.root_cause: AMQP lifecycle issues caused the transport status to remain stuck in the 'Connecting' state.
BACS-22179.fix_applied: The issue was resolved in version 4.15.2; customers were advised to update to this version.

BACS-22147.root_cause: The Unified App was not loading widgets due to an incorrect EOM site ID in RBM.

BACS-22146.root_cause: Subscription details were not available in the Partner Portal due to a mismatch in organization and site associations.
BACS-22146.fix_applied: The issue was resolved by fixing the ValidityDate null return.
BACS-22146.key_finding: The issue was related to incorrect associations in the subscription service.

BACS-21932.root_cause: Poor prediction due to insufficient input data and feedback mismatch in the model.
BACS-21932.fix_applied: AOC analyst manually mapped and modeled the assets to address the issue.
BACS-21932.key_finding: Smart Assist was suggested to eliminate feedback mismatches.
BACS-21932.workaround: Manual mapping and modeling were used as a temporary solution.

BACS-21926.root_cause: Onboarding failed due to assets with multiple parents, requiring corrections in the AOC modeling.
BACS-21926.fix_applied: The EOM team identified and fixed the assets with issues, leading to successful onboarding.
BACS-21926.key_finding: No code changes were required; the issue was resolved by correcting asset modeling.

BACS-21925.root_cause: Initial onboarding failed, leaving the site blocked.
BACS-21925.fix_applied: The fix was implemented and promoted to production, resolving the issue.

BACS-21882.fix_applied: All changes were promoted to production, and tools were handed over to DigiOps.
BACS-21882.key_finding: Failure scripts need to be executed in production for affected users.

BACS-21876.root_cause: Earlier, the default logo was being set automatically when changes were made from the Partner portal.
BACS-21876.fix_applied: Logos are now retained in CB if updated from the Partner portal, and changes are synced.

BACS-21865.root_cause: The Active Alarms widget header was displayed in all caps and lacked bold styling, breaking uniformity with other widgets.
BACS-21865.fix_applied: The Active Alarms widget header was updated to match the formatting of other widgets (Camel Case and bold styling).
BACS-21865.key_finding: The Active Alarms widget header was not aligned with other widgets initially.

BACS-21524.root_cause: Cache clearing was running synchronously, causing user creation failures.
BACS-21524.fix_applied: Cache clearing was updated to run in parallel, resolving the issue.
BACS-21524.key_finding: User creation was successful after the fix in QA and production environments.

BACS-21515.root_cause: The offering team did not add DKK prices for software materials during the initial load.
BACS-21515.fix_applied: Pricing details were provided by the offering team and updated in Zuora.
BACS-21515.key_finding: Collaboration between the offering team and the pricing team is required to ensure prices are uploaded.

BACS-21504.root_cause: Initial contextualization failed due to a dependency on Microsoft services.
BACS-21504.fix_applied: Auto-contextualization was completed successfully after updating DE Microservices.
BACS-21504.workaround: Manual intervention was required while waiting for a response from Microsoft.

BACS-21503.fix_applied: Confidence score updates successfully after a rerun operation in both staging and production environments.

BACS-21501.root_cause: Duplicate gateway names caused confusion in the UI.
BACS-21501.fix_applied: Gateway name correction was implemented in the UI to avoid mismatches, and the correct gateway was manually mapped.
BACS-21501.workaround: Manual mapping of the correct gateway was performed to resolve the issue.

BACS-21482.root_cause: The project was loaded manually after EOM P+ team intervention.
BACS-21482.fix_applied: Retrying the site creation process successfully synced the customer and site to CB.

BACS-21464.root_cause: Subscription was created and then canceled in Zuora, causing it to not bind in the Partner portal UI.
BACS-21464.key_finding: The API provides subscription details if a subscription exists, but the UI fails to bind it in certain cases.

BACS-21432.root_cause: Registration emails expired after 3 days due to no response, with no reactivation mechanism available.
BACS-21432.fix_applied: Runbook and DFMEA were updated to address the issue and provide guidance for similar scenarios.

BACS-21417.root_cause: Slowness in clearing the cache and insufficient timeout settings caused email delivery issues.
BACS-21417.fix_applied: Cache clearing was optimized, and the timeout duration was increased.
BACS-21417.key_finding: Email delivery was successfully validated in both staging and production environments after the fix.

BACS-21416.root_cause: Timeout issues from the Authorization Service or Node Service caused delays in user creation.
BACS-21416.fix_applied: Timeout fix implemented for related defect BACS-21417 resolved this issue.
BACS-21416.key_finding: The same Register API is used for user creation, which relies on Core Node and Core Authorization APIs.

BACS-21128.root_cause: Object ID 0 in the internal GW database lacked a point name and description, likely due to incorrect data added during initial discovery.
BACS-21128.fix_applied: An improvement story (NIACPO-7495) was created to address the issue.
BACS-21128.key_finding: The problematic point was not part of the exported point list from Niagara Station.

BACS-21076.root_cause: The Honeywell EBI Server registry entry 'ShortName' was blank, causing the CU installer to misidentify the installation type.
BACS-21076.fix_applied: The 'ShortName' was set to 'Enterprise Buildings Integrator,' and the server was reinstalled.
BACS-21076.key_finding: The CU installer skipped server DLL delivery due to the blank 'ShortName' registry entry.

BACS-21011.root_cause: Gateway details were missing in the ToolsCommissioning DB during the PdM to RBM migration.
BACS-21011.fix_applied: Gateway details were updated in the ToolsCommissioning DB, and the site was successfully migrated to RBM.

BACS-20986.root_cause: E-commerce login credentials were required to validate the issue in production.
BACS-20986.fix_applied: Issue was fixed and validated in the development environment.
BACS-20986.key_finding: E-commerce credentials are necessary for validation in production.

BACS-20970.root_cause: No RBM site details were found for the Gateway ID during Tool2 migration.
BACS-20970.fix_applied: Pre-migration mapping tool was used to ensure customer and site mapping, and gateway information was passed to the system registrations table.
BACS-20970.key_finding: Tool2 execution succeeded after gateway information was properly copied.

BACS-20969.root_cause: The CB-RBM customer mapping entry in the generic list was missing the 'CustomerId' value.
BACS-20969.fix_applied: The missing entry was updated in the table storage, and Tool1 migration was successful.

BACS-20968.fix_applied: Fix was made available in the SIT environment.

BACS-20936.root_cause: Redis storage policy was causing storage issues.
BACS-20936.fix_applied: Redis storage policy was changed to 'allkeys-lru', and a code-level fix will be tracked under a separate defect.
BACS-20936.key_finding: Permanent fix will be released with a microservices upgrade.

BACS-20920.root_cause: Forge link port was still set to the old port (50006) after the cloud connector upgrade.
BACS-20920.fix_applied: Forge link port was fixed in the connectivity package and verified in the latest build.
BACS-20920.key_finding: Port mismatch was the primary issue causing login failures.

BACS-20910.root_cause: Gateway data dependency in the SOM job caused failures in the independent SOM pipeline.
BACS-20910.fix_applied: Gateway ID dependency was made optional for the job, and the fix was deployed to staging.
BACS-20910.key_finding: CSOM upload no longer gets stuck after the fix.

BACS-20909.root_cause: All points in history were being subscribed when reading a single point value through the cloud connector.
BACS-20909.fix_applied: Subscription was limited to only the point being read, verified in the connectivity package '0.1.51-sprint-2.35'.
BACS-20909.key_finding: Subscription behavior was corrected to avoid unnecessary data subscriptions.

BACS-20907.root_cause: User was present under a site in CB AdminPortal without roles but with OBS app enabled, leading to issues in site visibility in Forge portal.
BACS-20907.fix_applied: A filter was implemented in the migration tool to ensure only users with roles are migrated.
BACS-20907.workaround: Users were advised to grant access to the site within CB.

BACS-20903.fix_applied: Bulk selection functionality was fixed and verified in multiple tabs, including All Points and All Assets.
BACS-20903.key_finding: Bulk user actions on 1500 points were completed without screen lag or execution delays.

BACS-20858.root_cause: Data was reaching Databricks but not appearing on the UI.
BACS-20858.fix_applied: Issue was resolved, and data was verified to appear on the UI in staging and for specific sites.
BACS-20858.key_finding: Day-cross scenario was validated successfully, and the next day's job ran without failure.

BACS-20848.root_cause: Equipment details were not available due to recurring issues with model synchronization.
BACS-20848.fix_applied: Model sync was successful, and the page loaded correctly.
BACS-20848.key_finding: Recurring issues require a permanent solution.

BACS-20790.root_cause: The 'RBMSyncStatus' field in the site node metadata was reset to 'Not Started' during node updates from the Partner portal.
BACS-20790.fix_applied: The issue was fixed as part of a related defect (BACS-19192) and verified in SIT.
BACS-20790.workaround: A workaround was applied to get the site back online by republishing it.

BACS-20789.root_cause: Missing model and firmware details were due to the controller being offline.
BACS-20789.workaround: Site team was advised to confirm the controller is online and fetch linked device details again.

BACS-20786.root_cause: Timezone mismatch and empty timezone errors were caused by incorrect summary information.
BACS-20786.fix_applied: The issue was fixed, and a script was provided to correct existing timezone mismatches.

BACS-20778.root_cause: Remaining SKU count temporarily shows incorrect values when a dashboard is unpublished from all sites.
BACS-20778.fix_applied: Validated that toggling the publish button restores the correct SKU count.
BACS-20778.key_finding: The issue is temporary and resolves itself upon reopening the UI.

BACS-20769.root_cause: CommandStatuses.json file was corrupted, causing update retries and exceptions.
BACS-20769.fix_applied: Issue resolved with a workaround; further improvements planned in future PIs.
BACS-20769.key_finding: Similar issue observed with commandactivator.json file.

BACS-10214.fix_applied: Provided documentation to guide the reporter in deleting the user account.
BACS-10214.key_finding: Issue resolution required reporter confirmation to validate the provided documentation.

BACS-10213.root_cause: Duplicate asset creation occurred due to lack of proper validation when modifying or adding assets.
BACS-10213.fix_applied: Validation for duplicate assets was implemented in the system.
BACS-10213.key_finding: Duplicate assets could be created by modifying an existing asset or adding a new asset with the same name.

BACS-10194.root_cause: Orphaned assets were created, but no code fix was applied.
BACS-10194.fix_applied: No action was taken as the issue was not reproducible.
BACS-10194.key_finding: The issue was closed without a code fix due to lack of reproducibility.

BACS-9899.root_cause: Site confidence level was not increasing despite feedback being provided.
BACS-9899.fix_applied: No re-run occurred for recalculating the GC; the current model behavior was deemed expected.
BACS-9899.key_finding: The confidence score was low due to the calculation logic involving point, role, and confidence factors.

BACS-9613.fix_applied: The Edit/Create user view was fixed to display properly and no longer appeared transparent.

BACS-9355.root_cause: Cloud connector was going offline due to a rate limit issue on the Kong gateway.
BACS-9355.fix_applied: Rate limiting was increased on the Kong gateway to handle more requests.
BACS-9355.key_finding: The issue was not related to the product but to the platform's rate-limiting configuration.

BACS-9286.root_cause: Cloud connector registration was stuck due to a plugin issue where the connector restart was scheduled instead of being forced.
BACS-9286.fix_applied: Code was updated to force the restart of the cloud connector in the plugin.
BACS-9286.key_finding: The issue was resolved by modifying the plugin to force a restart instead of scheduling it.

BACS-9285.fix_applied: Fix was delivered via an MSI package, and an option to disable redundancy checking was added in the CC configuration file.
BACS-9285.key_finding: The issue was resolved in the latest build with an updated configuration option.

BACS-9260.root_cause: Cloud connector registration failed due to an antivirus step.
BACS-9260.key_finding: The same issue was observed at other sites, indicating a broader problem.

BACS-9116.root_cause: User onboarding the gateway did not have valid access to the partner portal, which is a prerequisite.
BACS-9116.key_finding: Access to the partner portal is mandatory for gateway onboarding and upgrades.

BACS-9068.root_cause: Schema template download was failing due to outdated client ID and secret.
BACS-9068.fix_applied: Updated the schema editor client ID and secret to new values provided by the model editor team.
BACS-9068.key_finding: The issue was resolved by updating the credentials for the schema editor.

BACS-9031.root_cause: Firewall check showed success even though new firewall rules were not opened, due to failed URLs pointing to another data center.
BACS-9031.key_finding: The issue was related to testing HTTPS rules without TLS, which led to incorrect results.
BACS-9031.workaround: Validation was done as part of another story (BACS-9135) and evidence was attached for testing.

BACS-9002.root_cause: Cloud connector registration failed due to a missed configuration.
BACS-9002.fix_applied: Issue resolved with a workaround applied.
BACS-9002.workaround: A temporary workaround was implemented to address the issue.

BACS-8976.fix_applied: Issue was resolved after retrying the steps with assistance from an AOC representative.
BACS-8976.key_finding: The issue was not reproducible after retrying the steps.

BACS-8970.fix_applied: A specific regex (CH\d+) was used to resolve the issue.
BACS-8970.key_finding: The regex was tested on all points, assets, and the asset need help section.

BACS-8948.root_cause: Duplicate asset names were being created due to the absence of asset_id in the assisted tagging payload.
BACS-8948.fix_applied: Short-term fix involved updating the check in func*load*site*after*rerun; long-term solution proposed to send asset_id in the payload and modify assisted tagging logic.
BACS-8948.workaround: Short-term fix implemented to update the check in func*load*site*after*rerun.
BACS-8948.key_finding: Issue was verified and resolved in staging before deployment.

BACS-8917.root_cause: Configuration issue caused by a removed model ID, which was specific to a particular site.
BACS-8917.fix_applied: The specific configuration issue was fixed, and data flow to IoT resumed.
BACS-8917.key_finding: The issue was not observed in non-production environments and was specific to a single site.

BACS-8894.root_cause: Split asset creation was caused by asset names being based on point references.
BACS-8894.fix_applied: Verified in staging that split asset creation was no longer observed; issue resolved.
BACS-8894.key_finding: No special characters were found in asset names, and the issue was specific to point references.

BACS-8892.root_cause: Points under an asset being ignored led to unintended auto-ignoring of the asset.
BACS-8892.key_finding: Asset rows were being refreshed when points were ignored.

BACS-8833.fix_applied: Ignored points are no longer allowed for app association; when ignored, associated apps are automatically removed, and ignored points are deleted from SkySpark.
BACS-8833.key_finding: Ignored points associated with apps were being published to SkySpark, which is now resolved.

BACS-8013.fix_applied: Issue resolved; asset type filter now works even when assets are not associated with a site.
BACS-8013.key_finding: Data was being displayed in the asset type filter without site association.
